name: 100% Crunch
recipeIngredient: Two-thirds cup Seeds (pumpkin, flax, sesame, or your favorite)
2 teaspoons Yeast (fast rise or active dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water and honey.
2. Add molasses, salt, gluten, olive oil, seeds, and yeast to the water mixture.
3. Gradually mix in the white bread flour and whole wheat bread flour until well combined.
4. Knead the dough for an extra amount of time to achieve a crunchy texture.
5. Add the remaining seeds near the end of the first kneading process.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let it rise at room temperature for 1 hour or until doubled in size.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and hollow inside.
9. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely before slicing.
Enjoy this crunchy, chewy texture that rivals a toaster. High in fiber and packed with flavor, 100% Crunch adds a new dimension to an avocado and sprout sandwich.
